<!-- Thanks for contributing! Fill in the sections below — delete any that don't apply. -->

## Summary

<!-- One or two sentences explaining *what* this PR does and *why*. Why matters more than what. -->

## Type of change

<!-- Check one. -->

- [ ] `feat` — new user-facing feature
- [ ] `fix` — bug fix
- [ ] `refactor` — internal change, no behavior change
- [ ] `docs` — documentation only
- [ ] `test` — tests only
- [ ] `chore` / `ci` / `build` — tooling, deps, infra
- [ ] `perf` — performance improvement

## Related issues

<!-- e.g. Closes #42, Refs #17. Delete if none. -->

## Test plan

<!-- How did you verify this works? Bullet the manual or automated checks. -->

- [ ] `pnpm test` passes
- [ ] `pnpm typecheck` passes
- [ ] `pnpm build` passes
- [ ] New behavior covered by tests (or N/A — explain why)
- [ ] Tested manually against a real Notion DB (or N/A)

## Breaking changes

<!-- If this changes config schema, URL shape, env vars, or anything user-facing — describe the
     migration path here. Otherwise write "None". -->

None

## Checklist

- [ ] Targets `develop` (or `main` for hotfixes/releases per [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md))
- [ ] Conventional Commits style for commit messages
- [ ] No `any` without an explanatory comment
- [ ] No secrets, tokens, real database IDs, or hardcoded user-specific data
- [ ] README/CONTRIBUTING/SPEC updated if behavior changed
